title: Do a 30-minute focus session on something you've been avoiding
flavour: the thing you're avoiding is the thing. 30 minutes. one task. go.

title: Read 50 pages of a book you've been meaning to start
flavour: the book has been on the list. today it gets off the list.

title: Write a letter to yourself 1 year from now
flavour: future you is watching. what do you want them to remember about today?

title: Learn the basics of something you know nothing about — one hour of focused reading/watching
flavour: you don't have to become an expert. just stop being entirely clueless.

title: Spend 30 minutes with no plan — not Netflix, not music, not scroll. just unstructured time
flavour: boredom is the petri dish of ideas. incubate.

title: Make a decision you've been putting off — small or big. make it today
flavour: decision fatigue is real. but indecision is worse. pick. move.

title: Watch a documentary on a topic you know nothing about
flavour: the algorithm only shows you what you already like. this is a jailbreak.

title: Identify one belief you hold that you've never seriously questioned — and actually question it
flavour: sacred cows detected. not killing it. just nudging it. see what moves.

title: Do a proper life audit: write out what's working and what isn't across 5 areas of your life
flavour: maintenance mode. run diagnostics. it's probably fine. check anyway.

title: Meditate for 20 minutes using a guided session or timer
flavour: not emptying your mind. just watching the chaos without feeding it.
